feedback.text: Another thing to take into consideration is something called "FOMO" or Fear of missing out. It is often used in free to play games to force players to play as much as possible and creating an addiction. For example, you have to logg on a specific time of the day and do a special event or you miss out on alot of rewards. Or having a daily reward you have to logg in daily to get. A common practise for it is a "battlepass" but there are different forms of it. Often its also connected to using real life money to "get back" what you missed creating a forced incentive to spend money.
